sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64084" key="lukhqmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῠκ-ηθμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n64084.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a wolf's howl</tr_>, formed <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μυκηθμός</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
